what_was_done: Switched skill_search embedding from v2-moe (475M, CPU-stuck) to v1.5 (137M, 2.5x faster, 1.4GB RSS). Verified all 4 skill-v2 tools work over HTTP. Fixed --max-tokens CLI flag removal in skill_llm_backend.py. capture_skill now generates skills successfully.
